3315680.name: All In One Sports - Halloween Cosmetic DLC
3315680.description:
Halloween Special DLC - Experience Sports with Spooky Costumes and Equipment!

New Halloween Costumes: Vampire Costume & Hair Set: Embrace your inner vampire with this glowing-in-the-dark style!

Mummy Costume & Accessories: Transform into a legendary mummy for your sports adventures!

13 Halloween-Themed Sports Equipment:

Get ready for thrilling sports action with our specially designed Halloween equipment for:

Each piece of equipment has been reimagined with a haunting Halloween twist to make your sports experience extra special!

Update your game now and experience your favorite sports with a spooky Halloween makeover!
3315680.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 日语, 韩语, 波兰语, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙, 俄语, 简体中文, 繁体中文, 土耳其语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
